from openpyxl import load_workbook

print("=== Creating test formulas with explicit references ===")

test_row = 28
test_col = 15  # Column O

# Test MATCH for protein using explicit reference
formula_match_protein = '=MATCH($A11,Data!$A$2:$A$201,0)'
ws_task.cell(test_row, test_col).value = formula_match_protein

# Test MATCH for sample using explicit reference

ws_task.cell(test_row + 1, test_col).value = formula_match_sample
print(f"O29: {formula_match_sample}")

# Test INDEX with explicit references

print(f"O30: {formula_index}")

# Test INDEX with R1C1 notation
formula_index_r1c1 = '=INDEX(Data!R2C1:R201C52,R28C15,R29C15)'
ws_task.cell(test_row + 3, test_col).value = formula_index_r1c1
print(f"O31: {formula_index_r1c1}")
